info.title: webhook.co API
info.description: The webhook.co REST API: create ingest endpoints, inspect captured events, manage delivery destinations and subscriptions, and replay events. All requests are authenticated with a bearer `whk_` API key. Responses are JSON; every successful response is HTTP 200. Errors use a JSON `{error, message}` envelope, except 401/403 which are empty-bodied with a WWW-Authenticate header.

tags.name: Endpoints
tags.description: Create, inspect, and manage ingest endpoints and their secrets.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Browse, fetch, tail, and replay captured events.

tags.name: Replay Destinations
tags.description: Manage the allowlist of remote delivery destinations.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor from a prior page's nextCursor.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring name filter (empty = no filter).

post.summary: Create an endpoint (returns the one-time ingest URL)
Rotate an endpoint's ingest token (returns a new one-time ingest URL)
Add a provider signing/verification secret to an endpoint

get.summary: List an endpoint's provider secrets (metadata only)
List captured events for an endpoint

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor from a prior page's nextCursor.

parameters.name: verificationState
parameters.description: Filter by verification state: verified | failed | unattempted (repeatable).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring across id fields + header names/values.

get.summary: Pull a watermark-bounded forward page of events (cursor-pull tail)

parameters.name: sinceCursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor to resume from (mutually exclusive with since).

get.summary: Get a captured event's raw payload (base64 envelope)

post.summary: Replay an event to a target (records a delivery attempt)
Verify the org's tamper-evident audit chain

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor from a prior page's nextCursor.

post.summary: Register a replay destination (returns a one-time signing secret)
Toggle strict-FIFO delivery for a destination
Rotate a destination's signing secret (returns the new one-time secret)

parameters.name: sourceEndpointId
parameters.description: Filter by source endpoint (empty = no filter).

get.summary: Return the authenticated principal (org, scopes, optional user)

bearerAuth.description: A `whk_`-prefixed API key (opaque; not a JWT).

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid bearer credential. Empty body; the WWW-Authenticate header carries the challenge.

Forbidden.description: The credential is valid but lacks the required scope. Empty body; WWW-Authenticate carries the challenge.

NotFound.description: The referenced resource was not found.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the resource's current state.

TooManyRequests.description: A rate limit or soft cap was exceeded.

InternalError.description: An unexpected server error. The body is a plain-text sentinel.

EndpointsAddProviderSecretRequest.description: The server additionally validates the secret shape per provider (e.g. a Standard-Webhooks secret must be base64 key material); a malformed value is rejected with 400 VALIDATION_ERROR.

ReplayDestinationsCreateRequest.description: `url` must be a public HTTPS URL (no IP-literal host, credentials, disallowed port, or bare hostname); the server rejects a non-conforming URL with 400 VALIDATION_ERROR.

Error.description: The JSON error envelope for capability faults.
